chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 683 of 2009 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 10.03.2025 Mr. Faizan Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Mirjat, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh This matter pertains to distribution of jurisdiction between a federating units and original jurisdiction in such regard is vests exclusively with the Supreme Court. Even otherwise learned counsel for the petitioner could not demonstrate locus standi of the petitioner to maintain this petition. This petition found to be misconceived and is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
